old_value: {"id":"smallhold-23e","title":"WebFinger endpoint (/.well-known/webfinger)","description":"Implement the WebFinger endpoint used by other servers to discover actors. Parses the resource=acct:username@domain query param, validates the domain matches ours, looks up the username, returns the JRD response. Return 404 if username not found or domain doesn't match.","design":"Response: subject=acct:username@domain, aliases=[actor_uri, https://domain/@username], links=[profile-page html, self activity+json, ostatus subscribe template]. Content-Type: application/jrd+json.","acceptance_criteria":"Fetch /.well-known/webfinger?resource=acct:writer@yourdomain returns correct JRD with subject, aliases, and links; wrong domain returns 404; unknown username returns 404; Mastodon client account search resolves correctly","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-22T23:59:39Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-22T23:59:39Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-b89","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T16:59:41Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
